name: Rohit Vipin Mathews
title: Director - Engineering & Architecture
headline: Engineering leader scaling 350+ engineers across USA onshore and India offshore teams, delivering cloud-native AI-enabled platforms across education, agriculture, logistics, and hospitality.
bio:
I build and run large-scale distributed engineering organisations while staying close enough to the architecture to unblock it personally. Over 14 years at CES I've led 350+ engineers across USA onshore and India offshore accounts, scaled four distinct product lines from zero, and owned the AI enablement practice that improved how fast teams shipped by 30%+ across the org.

My work spans the full director-to-architect range: I design engineering cultures where ownership is non-negotiable, teams are indistinguishable from the customer's own engineering org, and every failure is explainable and reproducible by design. I've delivered cloud-native platforms across K-12 education, precision agriculture, logistics, and hospitality — and I've run the PoCs, RFPs, architecture proposals, and tiger-team engagements that turn client problems into funded engineering programmes.

I believe engineering teams don't win on cost — they win on trust. And trust is earned by solving the hard problems, not the easy ones.
